torch_pattern: x = input_tensor.float(); x = x * scalar; x = x + attention_mask  # optional, skipped if mask is None; out = torch.softmax(x, dim=-1)
applicability_notes: In-place op: output aliases input tensor (attn_weights), so output memory_config == input memory_config. Replaces the chain (x * scale) -> (x + mask) -> softmax(x, dim=-1) inside attention blocks, between QK^T matmul and the V matmul. Scale and mask are both optional (no-arg form does plain in-place softmax). block_w of sharded program config is dynamically set to padded_kv_len // 32 per decode step.; torch_pattern_source: registered golden _golden_function

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch, padded_local_heads, seq_q, padded_layer_past_len], decode-time attention scores
placement_observations.source: decoder attention call site (sharded decode path, model_config['SOFTMAX_PROGCFG'] with block_w = padded_layer_past_len // 32)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large prefill attention scores produced by interleaved matmul (e.g. reference QK^T output)
placement_observations.source: reference attention call site: attn_weights = ttnn.matmul(..., memory_config=dram_interleaved_memory_config) followed by scale_mask_softmax_in_place(..., program_config=ttnn.SoftmaxDefaultProgramConfig(), is_causal_mask=True)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: cross-attention scores, block_w sized by key_len ([B, H, q_len, key_len])
placement_observations.program_config: softmax_program_config with block_w = key_len // 32; is_causal_mask=False, scale = 1/sqrt(head_size)
placement_observations.source: cross-attention call site (use_mask = attn_type == 'cross'); non-cross path falls back to ttnn.bcast + plain softmax

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [9, 1, 6144, 384] (reshaped from [9, 16, 384, 384]); heads folded into row dim before softmax
placement_observations.program_config: model-specific softmax_program_config; scale = 1/sqrt(hidden_dim); no-op reshapes fused into surrounding bmms
placement_observations.source: encoder fused-op call site (qkt reshape -> scale_mask_softmax_in_place -> reshape back)
